ACCOUNT_DEPENDENCY_ERROR: This account is used by some transactions.
ACCOUNT_OWNERSHIP_VIOLATION: This account does not belong to the current user.
ACCOUNT_SYSTEM_NAME_CONFLICT: This account name is reserved by a system account. Choose a different name.
SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_DELETION_NOT_ALLOWED: Deleting a system account is not allowed.
SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_UPDATE_NOT_ALLOWED: Updating a system account is not allowed.
USER_ACCOUNT_MISSING_OWNER: Invalid account state. User account is missing an owner.
